## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, recent conference outcomes, and team updates.](https://fathom.video/share/wHM4FmbUcYveAX1G1h_Xg6ydedQ8JaZz?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX articles showing \~50% growth in 3-month trend; LLM mentions increasing, particularly for Learn page](https://fathom.video/share/wHM4FmbUcYveAX1G1h_Xg6ydedQ8JaZz?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Exec stood out as "hot vendor" at recent SaaS conference; new leads including Intel and Automotive Mastermind](https://fathom.video/share/wHM4FmbUcYveAX1G1h_Xg6ydedQ8JaZz?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Team rebalancing: Megan joining as new director next week; Mara transitioning off account](https://fathom.video/share/wHM4FmbUcYveAX1G1h_Xg6ydedQ8JaZz?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [First confirmed revenue directly attributed to ChatGPT mention of Exec](https://fathom.video/share/wHM4FmbUcYveAX1G1h_Xg6ydedQ8JaZz?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [LLM mentions increasing, especially for Learn page and stat blog](https://fathom.video/share/wHM4FmbUcYveAX1G1h_Xg6ydedQ8JaZz?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
